message:
Command `echo "=== DRT running, quick status check ==="
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "alive" || echo "DONE"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/final/gds/ 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL GDS!" || echo "no GDS"
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5` executed with exit code 0.
